creator: bsd@bontempi.net
text:
On FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE, htop dumps core after several minutes.

Sometimes it may take a bit longer.

It is installed from "latest" pkg repository on HP z620 with Xeon CPU E5-1650 and 16GB ECC ram.

$ htop --v
htop 2.0.2 

There are no messages left in logs. It just dumps core.
